---
title: TØ 4. Laboratory Exercise 1
format: 
  live-html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    css: ../styling/styles.css
    theme:
      light: cosmo
      dark: [darkly, ../styling/theme-dark.scss]
    respect-user-color-scheme: true

pyodide:
  packages:
    - pandas
    - openpyxl
---

## Exercise: Analysis of LØ data from LØ 1.
